testcase.classname: Environment Variable Contract Tests Stack-to-Lambda environment variable contract should pass ARNs consistently with clear naming
testcase.name: Environment Variable Contract Tests Stack-to-Lambda environment variable contract should pass ARNs consistently with clear naming

testcase.classname: Environment Variable Contract Tests Config class ARN handling and conversion should extract bucket names from ARNs correctly
testcase.name: Environment Variable Contract Tests Config class ARN handling and conversion should extract bucket names from ARNs correctly

testcase.name: Environment Variable Contract Tests Config class ARN handling and conversion should handle Glue config with ARN inputs

testcase.name: Environment Variable Contract Tests Config class ARN handling and conversion should handle S3Config with ARN inputs

testcase.classname: Environment Variable Contract Tests Environment variable usage in merge-tables handler should expect ARN-named environment variables
testcase.name: Environment Variable Contract Tests Environment variable usage in merge-tables handler should expect ARN-named environment variables

testcase.classname: Environment Variable Contract Tests CDK stack environment variable output should pass bucket ARNs with clear variable names
testcase.name: Environment Variable Contract Tests CDK stack environment variable output should pass bucket ARNs with clear variable names

testcase.classname: Environment Variable Contract Tests Method usage patterns should use appropriate methods for different operations

testcase.name: Config Config constructor with ARN inputs should default to empty strings when no values provided

testcase.classname: Config Config constructor with ARN inputs should correctly interpret environment variables

testcase.classname: Config S3Config should provide catalog and database execution context
testcase.name: Config S3Config should provide catalog and database execution context

testcase.name: Table Schema Configuration Schema generation should handle default static property as Glue mode

testcase.classname: Table Schema Configuration Schema generation should correctly generate S3 Tables with partitions but no WITH clause
